Programmes Catalogue

Programmes designed for entry, progression, and professional advancement

UCI Lira offers certificate and diploma pathways in nursing and midwifery with options for direct entry and extension routes.

Each path aligns with practical competence, patient-centered service, and values-based leadership in healthcare settings.

Certificate Pathways

Foundational routes for future healthcare professionals

Certificate programmes provide strong grounding in professional conduct, practical skill development, and safe care delivery.

Certificate

Certificate in Enrolled Nursing

Typically 2.5 years

A foundation programme designed to build safe, compassionate, practice-ready nursing professionals.

Practical training emphasisClinical professionalismValues-based care
Certificate

Certificate in Midwifery

Typically 2.5 years

Focused preparation for maternal and newborn care through hands-on learning and supervised practice.

Maternal health focusSimulation-led learningCommunity impact
Direct Diploma Pathways

Expanded depth for advanced nursing and midwifery preparation

Direct diploma options support learners seeking stronger clinical depth and longer-term professional growth.

Diploma

Diploma in Nursing Direct

Typically 3 years

Advanced nursing education pathway for students aiming for broader clinical competence and leadership growth.

Expanded clinical depthProfessional growthDirect-entry route
Diploma

Diploma in Midwifery Direct

Typically 3 years

A professional preparation pathway for student midwives who want strong practical grounding and confidence in care delivery.

Women-centered carePractice readinessDirect-entry route
Extension Pathways

Upgrade routes for practicing professionals

Extension options are structured for practitioners looking to deepen capability and strengthen career mobility.

Diploma Extension

Diploma in Nursing Extension

Extension route

An upgrade pathway for practitioners seeking to strengthen credentials, competence, and career progression.

Flexible progressionProfessional upgradeCareer advancement
Diploma Extension

Diploma in Midwifery Extension

Extension route

For practicing midwifery professionals who want to deepen their knowledge, competence, and service impact.

Professional extensionSkills growthService-centered learning
Take the next step

Need help choosing the right programme?

Start with admissions guidance, review eligibility expectations, and proceed through the official portal when ready.
